meaning: 加勒[斯里兰卡西南部港市]
examples: Bhutan, Galle in Sri Lanka, and Goa and Trivandrum in India have joined in.
Together, they toured Kalmunai as well as the devastated southern town of Galle.
This is how he used to travel back home every weekend and every holiday. He would take the bus to Galle.
Local schools are already planning to play cricket soon, though they obviously cannot play at Galle.
The Galle International Stadium, to give it its full title, is a much-admired seaside venue.
